title: Nobie offers a local, AI-ready spreadsheet app for Mac
friendlyTitle: A Mac spreadsheet app that can work with your chosen AI
summary: Nobie is a Mac beta positioned as an Excel-compatible runtime for people and agents. It keeps XLSX files and data local, preserves Windows Excel shortcuts, and lets users choose direct connections to Claude, Codex, or Gemini.
friendlySummary: Nobie is a new Mac app for Excel files. It says your spreadsheet stays on your computer and can connect directly to Claude, Codex, or Gemini.
whyItMatters: For spreadsheet-heavy work, local-first AI integration offers a more private alternative to uploading workbooks into a separate service—though users should still assess the model connection they enable.
friendlyWhyItMatters: It may give people a simpler way to use AI with spreadsheets while keeping the file format familiar and their local data under their control.
